main.description: A clients-registry entry: the presence record for one connected client, stored bare in the sx_clients bucket keyed by id (the authoritative identity). It carries no $type tag — it predates the convention and its type is implied by the bucket. Presence-only: an entry means 'registered and has not cleanly left' (no heartbeat in M1; see TASK-20). See ADR-0008, ADR-0012.

id.description: The client's verified identity (credential JWT name); equals the registry key.

kind.description: What the client is, self-declared at connect (e.g. client, coordinator, harness).

epoch.description: The protocol epoch the client connected under.

sdk.description: The SDK version that wrote the entry.

connected_at.description: RFC3339 connect time by the client's own UTC clock (the lean M1 field; bus-authoritative aging is TASK-20).
